entities.name: TOBACCO STREAK VIRUS
entities.description: A virus of the genus Ilarvirus and family Bromoviridae that causes necrosis disease in various crops and is transmitted via pollen and thrips.

entities.name: NECROSIS DISEASE
entities.description: A disease caused by Tobacco streak virus affecting sunflower, groundnut, and forage legumes.

entities.name: SUNFLOWER
entities.description: A host crop affected by Tobacco streak virus and tested for seed transmission.

entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: A host crop affected by Tobacco streak virus and tested for seed transmission.

entities.name: FORAGE LEGUMES
entities.description: Host crops affected by Tobacco streak virus.

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The geographic region where the specific isolate of Tobacco streak virus is occurring.

entities.name: THRIPS
entities.description: Insects of the family Thripidae that assist in the pollen transmission of Tobacco streak virus.

entities.name: POLLEN TRANSMISSION
entities.description: The mechanism by which Tobacco streak virus is transmitted through pollen, assisted by thrips.

entities.name: SEED TRANSMISSION
entities.description: The process of virus transmission through seeds, which was investigated across multiple host species.

entities.name: MUNGBEAN
entities.description: A host species tested for the seed transmission of Tobacco streak virus.

entities.name: MARIGOLD
entities.description: A host species tested for the seed transmission of Tobacco streak virus.

entities.name: FRENCH BEAN
entities.description: A host species tested for the seed transmission of Tobacco streak virus.

entities.name: URDBEAN
entities.description: A host species tested for the seed transmission of Tobacco streak virus.

entities.name: SOYBEAN
entities.description: A host species tested for the seed transmission of Tobacco streak virus.

entities.name: CHENOPODIUM QUINOA
entities.description: A host species tested for the seed transmission of Tobacco streak virus.

entities.name: GOMPHRENA GLOBOSA
entities.description: A weed host species tested for the seed transmission of Tobacco streak virus.

entities.name: PARTHENIUM HYSTEROPHORUS
entities.description: A weed host species tested for the seed transmission of Tobacco streak virus.

entities.name: DISEASE EPIDEMIOLOGY
entities.description: The study of the distribution and determinants of the disease, influenced by the findings on seed transmission.
